name: GROMACS On Slurm
summary: Run GROMACS jobs on Slurm with MPI, OpenMP, GPU, and checkpoint planning.
description: This skill provides a conservative Slurm wrapper for GROMACS simulations, including executable naming, MPI/OpenMP layout, optional GPU offload flags, checkpoint/restart controls, and a dry-run-first smoke test.

tools.name: gmx
tools.notes: Common serial or thread-MPI GROMACS wrapper.

inputs.name: coordinate_file
inputs.description: Input coordinate file such as conf.gro.

inputs.name: gromacs_command
inputs.description: GROMACS wrapper command, usually gmx or gmx_mpi.

inputs.name: gpu_offload_settings
inputs.description: Optional reviewed mdrun GPU settings such as GMX_NB, GMX_PME, and GMX_GPU_ID.

inputs.name: output_dir
inputs.description: Durable output directory for TPR, logs, checkpoints, and run records.

outputs.name: gromacs_launch_plan
outputs.description: Reviewable Slurm, MPI/OpenMP, GPU, checkpoint, and command plan.

outputs.name: tpr_file
outputs.description: GROMACS portable binary run input created by grompp when RUN_GROMACS=1.

outputs.name: mdrun_outputs
outputs.description: Optional mdrun log, checkpoint, trajectory, and energy files.

examples.title: Plan or run a GROMACS smoke test on Slurm

tests.description: Validate the manifest and referenced examples.
Run plan-only mode first, then set RUN_GROMACS=1 on a short debug partition with a site-approved GROMACS module.
